action.reasoning: Observation: Training crashed with shape mismatch (24 vs 28 at dim 2) in residual add due to input_conv (k=5) shrinking H from 32->28 without lat padding, then resblocks shrinking further to 24; predict.py also has incorrect broadcast reshape(1,2,1,1) for 5D test inputs. Previous best 600.5 on ~2.4M model. Analysis: PeriodicConv2d only padded lon (correct for periodic), but must also pad lat (with replicate for stability) to preserve H=32 exactly; this matches common practice in global weather CNNs. Decision: Fix PeriodicConv2d to pad both dims (replicate lat, circular lon), correct norm reshape in predict.py, reduce to 20 epochs (per >20-epoch rule), keep scaled model (160ch/10blk ~5M params), lr=3e-4 cosine; run train then submit_eval on fixed best.pt for new baseline.
